tests.test_name: Swift - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a single Swift test fixture and verifies that the analysis pipeline produces valid, fully-resolved JSON output containing at least one named test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Swift - PO - single test, core output structure
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'swift' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'swift_single_sample.swift', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'swift', contains 1+ tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Swift - PO - struct+for data-driven expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a data-driven Swift fixture and verifies that the analyser expands struct/for-loop parameterisation into one discrete test entry per data row, yielding at least three tests.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Swift - PO - struct+for data-driven expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'swift' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'swift_datadriven_sample.swift', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'swift', and contains 3 or more tests each with a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Swift - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a single Swift test fixture and verifies that the analysis output includes a populated test_coverage_matrix on the first test in addition to core structural validity.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Swift - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'swift' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'swift_single_sample.swift', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'swift', contains 1+ tests with non-empty test_name, and the first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a data-driven Swift fixture and verifies that the analyser collapses all parameterised cases into exactly one test whose coverage matrix rows match the number of examples and conform to the Swift schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'swift' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'swift_datadriven_sample.swift', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'swift', contains exactly 1 test with a non-empty test_name, coverage matrix row count matches the source examples, and rows use the correct Swift schema
